title: デビュー戦の後に・宵の狭間に

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Wind lashing at my skin as I tear across the turf...
The sensation lingers, etched into me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(To the front, to the future, to victory. The heat
that's burned away at my life... It's become a
pounding bell in my chest...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I feel so hot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...This is how I start the Twinkle Series—I've taken
my very first step!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ramonu's little sister really gave it her all.
Think she'll ever catch up to the family superstar?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, we're talking about the crown jewel of the
Mejiro family here... Ramonu's running is on
another level entirely.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Even if my light has yet to shine as hers does...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Someday, it will make a lasting impression on
everyone here! I shall make it happen!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Ardan's debut race in the books, I
head out to meet her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Your efforts allowed me to dedicate myself fully
to this moment—this race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However... that notion is mine, and mine alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was unable to impress my light upon the
spectators in attendance today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
At this moment, my light can do little more than
conjure memories of my sister's glory...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I swear that someday I will come to emit a
radiance all my own—bright enough for all to see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now, let's be getting back...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: To... today's—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan collapses. I rush to catch her, then
put a finger to her pulse. She's conscious,
fortunately, but on the brink of total exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's immediately taken to the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After undergoing a thorough medical examination
that confirms her life isn't in danger, Mejiro Ardan
starts to look a little better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just to be on the safe side, it's decided that she'll
spend the rest of the day recuperating at the
Mejiro family's rest house.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I do apologize for worrying you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? I...

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. You're Mejiro Ardan's trainer, yes?
May I have a moment? There's something I'd like
to discuss with you.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text: Please, follow me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I shall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After leading me to another room, the Mejiro
family's chief physician asks me to take a seat.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
If you'll allow me to be frank, I'm concerned
about Lady Ardan's present condition.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
It may be in the young mistress's best interests to
step away from racing for the time being and
convalesce here at the rest house. Simply put...

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
Speaking as her physician, I'd like you to
contemplate whether it's truly necessary for her
to rush into the Twinkle Series at this juncture.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
I suspect that Lady Ardan bottled up so much
stress and fatigue that when the race was finally
over, everything caught up to her at once.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
The bodily wear and tear from training... The
mental pressure and anxiety she felt leading up to
her debut...

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
All of that, amplified by the intensity of a real
race—more taxing than any training bout thus far.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
When she let herself relax at the end, the effects
of all these stressors came crashing down on her...

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
If the young mistress sets her sights on even
bigger races, the weight on her shoulders will
surely be far greater than it was today.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I believe that you—better than
anyone—should be able to grasp the gravity of
this situation.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
I'm well aware of the young mistress's passion for
racing, and I would never make light of her
devotion to it.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
And though the final decision falls to Lady Ardan,
I do ask that, as her trainer, you keep all of this in
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the conversation with the physician, Mejiro
Ardan's nanny drives me back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. Thank you ever so much for all you've
done to assist Lady Ardan today. On behalf of
the Mejiro family, you have our deepest
gratitude.
choice_data_list: Oh, oh no, I didn't do much at all.
Oh, oh no, I didn't do much at all.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
...The master and mistress spoke with Lady Ardan
earlier today.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they urged that she reconsider her
decision to devote her life to racing.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
I've served the young mistress since she was but
an infant, and I've no trouble at all discerning the
nature of desires and her heartaches.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I have a request for you—the
trainer who is to walk beside Lady Ardan at this
academy.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
I implore you to make the decision that is best for
her.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
I have the utmost faith that you, whom the young
mistress herself chose, are able to do that.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Now, if you'll excuse me, I bid you good evening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...The decision that's best for Mejiro Ardan. What
could that be?

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
Speaking as her physician, I'd like you to
contemplate whether it's truly necessary for her
to rush into the Twinkle Series at this juncture.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they urged that she reconsider her
decision to devote her life to racing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...I know Ardan has her doubts, but I believe in
her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have faith that she'll ace her debut and be able
to race together with Yaeno and me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I may fade away and be forgotten. And yet, here
and now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I still wish to shine, and I'm willing to do whatever
it takes to do so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's words from that day echo in my
head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...What was I wavering for? My mind's been made
up all this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm determined to go on being Mejiro Ardan's
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means, as her trainer, there's only one
thing for me to do!
